#version 300 es
precision highp float; in vec2 vTextureCoord; uniform vec2 uResolution; uniform vec2 uMousePos; uniform float uTime; out vec4 fragColor;  const float PI = 3.14159265;  float hash11(float n) { return fract(sin(n) * 43758.5453123); }  float sdRoundBox(vec2 p, vec2 b, float r) {   vec2 q = abs(p) - b + r;   return length(max(q, 0.0)) + min(max(q.x, q.y), 0.0) - r; }  void main() {   vec2 uv = vTextureCoord;   float aspect = uResolution.x / max(uResolution.y, 1.0);   vec2 p = (uv - vec2(1.0, 0.5)) * vec2(aspect, 1.0);   p += (uMousePos - 0.5) * vec2(0.035, -0.025);    float t = uTime;    vec3 ink = vec3(0.039, 0.039, 0.047);   vec3 porcelain = vec3(0.949, 0.941, 0.918);   vec3 signal = vec3(0.078, 0.945, 0.584);   vec3 violet = vec3(0.60, 0.27, 1.0);    vec3 col = ink;   float leftMask = smoothstep(0.10, 0.62, uv.x);    float ly = abs(fract(p.y / 0.16 + 0.5) - 0.5) * 0.16;   float lines = smoothstep(0.0022, 0.0, ly);   col += porcelain * lines * 0.030 * leftMask;    vec2 wc = vec2(-0.26 * aspect, 0.03);   vec2 slot = wc + vec2(0.0, 0.17);    float pulse = 0.0;   vec3 coins = vec3(0.0);   for (int i = 0; i < 11; i++) {     float seed = float(i) * 7.31 + 1.7;     float T = mix(8.0, 14.0, hash11(seed));     float lt = fract((t + hash11(seed + 2.0) * T) / T);     float e = lt * lt * (3.0 - 2.0 * lt);     vec2 start = vec2(       -aspect * mix(0.55, 1.0, hash11(seed + 3.0)),       mix(-0.62, 0.62, hash11(seed + 4.0))     );     vec2 pos = mix(start, slot, e);     pos.y += sin(lt * PI * mix(2.0, 4.0, hash11(seed + 6.0)) + seed) * 0.10 * (1.0 - e);     float r = mix(0.007, 0.014, hash11(seed + 5.0)) * mix(1.0, 0.55, e);     float d = length(p - pos);     float core = smoothstep(r, r * 0.35, d);     float glow = exp(-d * d / (r * r * 9.0)) * 0.30;     float life = smoothstep(0.0, 0.10, lt) * smoothstep(1.0, 0.96, lt);     float ci = hash11(seed + 8.0);     vec3 ccol = ci > 0.82 ? violet : (ci > 0.45 ? signal : porcelain);     coins += ccol * (core + glow) * life * 0.55;     pulse += smoothstep(0.93, 1.0, lt);   }   pulse = clamp(pulse, 0.0, 1.2);   float walletVis = smoothstep(1.5, 2.1, aspect);   col += coins * mix(0.35, 1.0, leftMask) * (0.65 + 0.35 * walletVis);    vec3 mark = vec3(0.0);   mark += signal * exp(-dot(p - wc, p - wc) * 1.6) * 0.028;   vec2 vb = p - wc - vec2(-0.62, -0.38);   mark += violet * exp(-dot(vb, vb) * 2.2) * 0.020;    float dBody = sdRoundBox(p - wc, vec2(0.27, 0.17), 0.05);   vec3 wcol = mix(porcelain, signal, 0.55);   mark += wcol * (smoothstep(0.003, 0.0, abs(dBody)) * 0.40 + exp(-abs(dBody) * 11.0) * 0.06)        * (0.75 + 0.30 * pulse);   mark += signal * smoothstep(0.0, -0.01, dBody) * 0.018 * (0.6 + 0.5 * pulse);    float dSlot = sdRoundBox(p - slot, vec2(0.095, 0.006), 0.006);   mark += signal * smoothstep(0.0035, 0.0, dSlot) * (0.30 + 0.45 * pulse);   mark += signal * exp(-abs(dSlot) * 26.0) * 0.10 * (0.4 + 1.0 * pulse);    vec2 cp = p - (wc + vec2(0.195, 0.0));   mark += wcol * smoothstep(0.003, 0.0, abs(length(cp) - 0.030)) * 0.38;   mark += signal * smoothstep(0.010, 0.0035, length(cp))        * (0.25 + 0.18 * (0.5 + 0.5 * sin(t * 1.3)) + 0.15 * pulse);    float rt = fract(t / 7.0);   mark += signal * exp(-abs(length(p - wc) - rt * 0.9) * 34.0)        * (1.0 - rt) * smoothstep(0.0, 0.08, rt) * 0.08;    col += mark * walletVis;    fragColor = vec4(col, 1.0); }
compiledVertexShaders:
#version 300 es
precision mediump float;in vec3 aVertexPosition; in vec2 aTextureCoord;uniform mat4 uMVMatrix; uniform mat4 uPMatrix;out vec2 vTextureCoord; out vec3 vVertexPosition;void main() { gl_Position = uPMatrix * uMVMatrix * vec4(aVertexPosition, 1.0); vTextureCoord = aTextureCoord; }

#version 300 es
precision highp float; in vec2 vTextureCoord; uniform sampler2D uTexture; uniform vec2 uResolution; uniform float uTime; out vec4 fragColor;  float hash21(vec2 p) { return fract(sin(dot(p, vec2(12.9898, 78.233))) * 43758.5453); }  void main() {   vec2 uv = vTextureCoord;   vec4 color = texture(uTexture, uv);   vec3 ink = vec3(0.039, 0.039, 0.047);   float g = hash21(uv * uResolution * 0.5 + floor(uTime * 6.0) * vec2(17.0, 31.0));   color.rgb += (g - 0.5) * 0.035;   vec2 q = (uv - 0.5) * vec2(1.15, 1.5);   float vig = smoothstep(1.35, 0.45, length(q));   color.rgb = mix(ink, color.rgb, mix(0.65, 1.0, vig));   color.rgb = mix(color.rgb, ink, smoothstep(0.86, 1.0, uv.y));   color.rgb = mix(color.rgb, ink, smoothstep(0.10, 0.0, uv.y));   fragColor = vec4(color.rgb, color.a); }

#version 300 es
precision mediump float;in vec3 aVertexPosition; in vec2 aTextureCoord;uniform mat4 uMVMatrix; uniform mat4 uPMatrix; uniform mat4 uTextureMatrix;out vec2 vTextureCoord; out vec3 vVertexPosition;void main() { gl_Position = uPMatrix * uMVMatrix * vec4(aVertexPosition, 1.0); vTextureCoord = (uTextureMatrix * vec4(aTextureCoord, 0.0, 1.0)).xy; }
